title: 紫微斗數全書（維基文庫校錄本）

license.notes: The historical original is public domain. The Wikisource transcription is used only to verify uncopyrightable facts and formula structure; no transcription text is redistributed.

rights.notes: Project-authored tables encode calculation facts and do not reproduce the Wikisource text.

rights_review.evidence: Historical public-domain source and Wikisource license inspected; production stores formulas and short locators only.

quality.notes: Primary historical formula source. Variant readings and modern school differences remain explicit disputes.

notes: Used for palace, star, cycle, four-transformation, minor-limit, and ruler calculation facts. It is not used as an interpretation corpus.
